notes:
It launches but the intro video doesn't play so its a black screen. I can easily skip that and get to the main menu, which does indeed have sound and music.  DLC works. When I actually play the main game, its just an endless black screen and looping music after skipping events. 

I tried to do winetricks devenum quartz wmp10 on a 32bit prefix but to no success since I don't know how to do it successfully like in winehq especially for proton to basically make the videos and events play out and show. Unplayable until I figure out how to do this workaround, but this game is soooo close to working completely... and i get to run it in dxvk for vulkan and Nep Nep things. One of my fav games.
title: Megadimension Neptunia VII

notes: Game runs flawlessly in 32bit wineprefix. Run game once, go to steamapps/compatdata/460120/pfx and delete everything IN the folder. Run this IN pfx folder: $  WINEARCH=win32 WINEPREFIX=$PWD winetricks devenum quartz wmp10    ,    make sure to install the codecs.    Enable CpuMultithreading: $  WINEPREFIX=$PWD wine ./drive_c/windows/regedit.exe  ( add new KEY named " Direct3D " in HKCU\Software\Wine , and in there add DWORD named " csmt " with value " 0x1 " ).    Create a folder named " syswow64 " with nothing in it in  drive_c/windows  .  Symlink all DLL in steamapps/common/Proton x.x/dist/lib/wine/dxvk/ , into the game folder /common/Megadimension Neptunia VII/ , required because Proton lacks proper 32bit support.    Next run the game normally from Steam, it should install VC runtime and then run with working video/events and without lag.
title: Megadimension Neptunia VII

notes: Works fine after following the instructions right below. A small note: after WMP launched, I clicked to close its window but it kept running in the background, so I had to kill it to make the winetricks installation finish. It did not create any problem.
title: Megadimension Neptunia VII

notes:
Thank you SO MUCH for the workaround where I create a 32bit prefix in /pfx using winetricks as it works very well. I had trouble last time because the Windows Media Player 10 errored out and got stuck on 15% but with the winetricks update, it was fully complete and I got everything I needed. I did have to kill Windows Media Player to let it complete the winetricks installation but it was worth it. 

Then I did enable CpuMultithreading using the command: $ WINEPREFIX=$PWD wine ./drive_c/windows/regedit.exe ( add new KEY named " Direct3D " in HKCU\Software\Wine , and in there add DWORD named " csmt " with value " 0x1 " ). Wine CSMT. 

After that I symlinked like he listed , which basically means you create shortcuts for all the DLL in steamapps/common/Proton x.x/dist/lib/wine/dxvk/ to the destination path of the game /common/Megadimension Neptunia VII/  . 

Then I clicked play for steam to install vcrun visual studio and direct X 11 stuff and play. 

Now I am able to get the Events working flawlessly, Movies  and Intros. Game runs very smooth in DXVK and feels like it runs better than in Windows, and no screen tearing on World Map. 

You could also probably do this with Protontricks in theory but following the Winetricks workaround I did. In  steamapps/compatdata/460120/pfx .
With command in /pfx: $ WINEARCH=win32 WINEPREFIX=$PWD winetricks devenum quartz wmp10 . 

Create Symlink by pressing Link here in file manager or by terminal with ln -s /path/to/original  /path/to/link . In dolphin file manager , I dragged the contents of  steamapps/common/Proton 4.2/dist/lib/wine/dxvk/ to the Window where it is at /common/Megadimension Neptunia VII/ and pressed link here. Symlink is basically a shortcut to sum it up.
title: Megadimension Neptunia VII

notes: When using the 32-Bit wineprefix the Game runs fine
